scope: Add V2 Convert button to Lesson admin panel conversion UI
Implement V2 job creation with pipelineVersion=2 and conversionMode=v2_crops
Create V2 job runner using Vision + PDF.js cropping pipeline
Implement exercise creation from cropped image segments
Store cropped PNGs as Payload media assets
Attach images to rich_text blocks in exercises
Add traceability metadata fields (sourcePdfDocumentId, sourcePageIndex, sourceBboxNormalized, pipelineVersion, jobId)
Implement job status tracking (queued, running, completed, failed) with progress updates
Handle guardrails for failed/rejected image crops without creating exercises
Add warnings for zero valid segments
assumptions: Existing V1 conversion job infrastructure (Jobs collection, runner patterns) can be reused
Lesson collection exists with PDF document field
Exercise collection exists and supports rich_text fields with image attachments
Vision + PDF.js cropping pipeline already exists and can be called from job runner
Media collection exists for storing cropped PNG assets
